engine_note: Blessed 2026-07-04 against the current vector_extract.py / pipeline.py, the trusted post-fix state after commit 81bc3ba (FinaleMaestro SMuFL classification). Re-bless with UPDATE_EXPECTATIONS=1 or --bless after a deliberate, reviewed engine change -- justify the diff in the commit message. See tests/README.md.

trisagion_satb.notes: Small clean 4-staff SATB -- the original bake-off reference piece (docs/choir-training-roadmap.md).

finley_complete_liturgy.notes: Large multi-section, multi-verse-lyric liturgy (sections=22, 371 measures) -- exercises section detection and lyric verse stacking at scale.

hilko_star_antiphon.notes: Shared-staff T+B (2-staves-per-system) whole-measure-rest SHRINK case: measures 46 and 48 are genuinely 3.0 beats, and the T/B whole rest is resized down from the 4.0-beat default to match (see the dedicated spot-check in test_regression.py). Also validated byte-identical by the 81bc3ba commit message.

joseph_damascus_first_kathisma.notes: Genuine 'FinaleMaestro' SMuFL font (confirmed via embedded font names) revived by commit 81bc3ba; one of the 9 Joseph-of-Damascus booklets that now extract at 100% integrity. Single-voice (monophonic chant transcription), 2 Western pages auto-selected out of a mixed Western/Byzantine-neume booklet.

theophany_series1.notes: Whole-measure-rest GROW case: part P1/P2 measure 36 resizes a whole rest up to 14.0 beats (a 14-beat chant melisma; the exact example in vector_extract.py's whole-measure-rest-normalization comment), P3/P4 measure 38 up to 14.25 beats -- see the dedicated spot-check in test_regression.py. Mixed Byzantine-chant + SATB multi-antiphon booklet. RE-BLESSED for issue #52: the chant-troparia pages are single-staff monophonic systems that the removed vertical-gap heuristic used to fuse into phantom multi-staff systems (Mode A); splitting them back to the single-staff systems actually engraved corrects those pages and renumbers the downstream SATB melisma bars (94 -> 116 measures, GROW spot-check measures 28/30 -> 36/38). Combined with the per-system integrity metric (Mode B) that no longer penalizes the single-voice chant measures against a piece-global 4-voice set, integrity rises 79.8% -> 95.7% (now above the 90% gate, exit 0). The residual failures are genuine SATB-page beat disagreements, still counted.

holwey_divine_liturgy.notes: Large liturgy, 20 sections detected, 581 measures -- the biggest piece in the corpus, stress-tests runtime and section detection at scale.

cherubic_2staff_reduction.notes: The documented 2-staff choral-reduction case (docs/choir-training-roadmap.md, 'The tie-breaker: the Cherubic Hymn's 2-staff reduction pages'): S+A share the treble staff, T+B the bass, with a mid-piece switch to 4-staff. Voice separation resolved by the per-measure constrained search. 3 known divisi-drop warnings (correction-UI material, not a regression).

finley_little_litany_legacy_maestro.notes: TRUE legacy TrueType 'Maestro' (Sonata-codepoint) font, routed through legacy_glyph_map.json -- contrasts with joseph_damascus_first_kathisma's genuine SMuFL 'FinaleMaestro'. Small, clean, 0 warnings; substituted for the Joseph-Damascus 01-08 set named in the issue brief, none of which currently extract cleanly (all in the known shared-staff voice-beat-reconciliation review pile, exit 2, 0-20% integrity) -- see joseph_01_08_review_pile note below.

receive_ye_tikey_zes.notes: Genuine agreeing 4/4 whole rests: whole_measure_rests_resized=0 (rests already match real content -- the 'genuine full-measure rest' path in vector_extract.py's normalization is a no-op here). Third variant alongside the shrink (hilko_star_antiphon) and grow (theophany_series1) cases.

finley_entrance_hymn_multiverse.notes: Multi-verse standalone piece (lyric_verses=2) -- exercises the verse toggle feature's data path (commit a1d2749) on a small, clean, 0-warning piece.

joseph_01_08_review_pile.explanation: The issue brief's item 8 suggested 'one of the Joseph 01-08 set that's stable' as a legacy-Maestro example. As of this suite's creation, none of 01_joseph-damascus-olihc_1-3-wnbn.pdf .. 08-Joseph-Damascus-Glory-Aposticha-WNBN.pdf extract above 20% measure integrity (all exit 2, all in the known shared-staff voice-beat-reconciliation frontier -- see README.md 'Full-catalog run' notes and issue #52). finley_little_litany_legacy_maestro.pdf was substituted as a stable legacy-Maestro piece instead. Once #52 lands, one of the Joseph 01-08 pieces could be added as an additional corpus entry.
